title: Zigh's Faithful PvP Addon (32x)
description: Mostly for myself, alters faithful 32x to be better for PvP.
body:
### Mostly for myself, alters faithful 32x to be better for PvP.
Changes (mostly):
- Short swords, axes, tridents, and mace
- Smaller Totem of Undying
- Mostly Transparent Inventory
- Highlighted corners of cobwebs and powdered snow
- Cooldown meter now resembles a diamond sword (kinda)
- Minor adjustment to a few paintings
- Bow and Crossbow Charge indicators
- Broken elytra warning
- More changes will be added in the future

All textures modified from [Faithful 32x](https://faithfulpack.net/)
